title: Allow setting top level parameters at runtime
body:
Questa has a feature where at compile time you can "float" module parameters, which then allows you to set them at runtime. This is useful for verifying parameters since you can run a load of tests with different values without having to recompile the simulator. The Questa options are `-floatparams` for `vopt` and then `-Gparam_name=param_value` for `vlog`.

It would be great if Verilator could support this too. Actually I found issue #1045 which sounds like exactly this, however all the links are dead and I can't find any reference to the code snippets (e.g. `+parameter+`) anywhere in the Verilator source, even with `git log -S '+parameter+' --oneline`. Does this feature exist?
